text:
(FFS) Durable Medical Equipment (DME) file contains fee-for-service claims submitted by Durable Medical Equipment suppliers to the DME Medicare Administrative Contractor (MAC).

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Diagnosis, (ICD diagnosis code)
Services provided (CMS Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) codes)
Dates of service
Charge
Reimbursement amounts
Supplier provider number
Supplier NPI

Program: 
Medicare
Category: 
Medicare Fee-For-Service Claims
Privacy Level:
